setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Welcome to Paperless RAG
setup.description: Please configure the connections in the following steps.

paperless.title: Paperless-ngx Connection
paperless.description: Connect Paperless RAG to your Paperless-ngx instance.
paperless.tokenHelp: Found at: Settings → Profile → API Token
paperless.tooltip: Paperless-ngx is your document management system. Enter the address of your Paperless instance and an API token so Paperless RAG can read your documents. Find the token in Paperless under: Settings → Profile → API Token.

embedding.title: Embedding Configuration
embedding.description: Embeddings convert text into vectors for semantic search.
embedding.tooltip: Embeddings convert text into numbers so the computer can understand which texts are similar in meaning. Ollama runs locally on your machine (free), OpenAI and OpenRouter are online services (paid, but very good). The model 'nomic-embed-text' (Ollama) or 'openai/text-embedding-3-small' (OpenRouter) are good starting points.

llm.title: Language Model (LLM)
llm.description: The language model generates answers based on your documents.
llm.tooltip: The language model (LLM = Large Language Model) is the AI that answers your questions. Ollama runs locally (free, but needs a powerful computer), OpenRouter gives you access to many models like Claude or GPT-4 (paid). For starters we recommend 'anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku' via OpenRouter.

done.title: Setup Complete!
done.description: Paperless RAG is ready. You can now search your documents.

chat.placeholder: Ask a question about your documents …
chat.newLine: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

examples.q1: Which Vodafone invoices do I have?
examples.q2: What are my latest Amazon orders?

settings.title: Settings
settings.webhookPortHelp: The port the container is reachable on from outside (default: 3000)
settings.webhookHelp: Enter this URL in Paperless-ngx under Settings → Workflows.
settings.webhookSecretHelp: If set, Paperless-ngx must send this secret in the request header.

tooltips.paperless: Paperless-ngx is your document management system. Enter the address of your Paperless instance and an API token so Paperless RAG can read your documents. Find the token in Paperless under: Settings → Profile → API Token.
tooltips.embedding: Embeddings convert text into numbers so the computer can understand which texts are similar in meaning. Ollama runs locally on your machine (free), OpenAI and OpenRouter are online services (paid, but very good). The model 'nomic-embed-text' (Ollama) or 'openai/text-embedding-3-small' (OpenRouter) are good starting points.
tooltips.llm: The language model (LLM = Large Language Model) is the AI that answers your questions. Ollama runs locally (free, but needs a powerful computer), OpenRouter gives you access to many models like Claude or GPT-4 (paid). For starters we recommend 'anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku' via OpenRouter.
tooltips.webhook: A webhook is an automatic notification. When you add a new document in Paperless-ngx, Paperless sends a message to this URL – and Paperless RAG automatically indexes the document.
tooltips.indexing: During indexing all your Paperless documents are read, split into small text sections (chunks) and stored as vectors. This enables semantic search. New documents are automatically indexed via webhook.
